Careers

Explore Our Communities

PRS manages 12 Lifeplan Communities and 25 affordable housing communities in over 30 locations, and we are regularly looking for talented people.

  • View Listing

  • View Listing

    View All Jobs

Central Office Job Openings

Headquartered in Medford, Oregon, PRS develops, operates, and manages a growing family of more than 40 organizations.

Central Office Job Openings

PRS Community Job Openings

With more than 30 locations in Washington, Oregon, California, Wisconsin, Arizona, New Mexico, and Texas, we regularly look for talented people.

PRS Community Job Openings

Never Miss an Opportunity

Join our talent community to be notified of job updates, events and more.
